ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the device (e.g., Virtex6, 7 series, Spartan6) */,
  "elaboration_dir" TEXT /* Elaboration directory for the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the device */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the device was added to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., C_FAMILY, C_INTERFACE_TYPE) */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., String, Integer) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration is for */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON representation of the device configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Family of the device (e.g., Virtex6, 7 series, Spartan6)
